name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (ES)
long_description: 1.Express own thoughts and ideas clearly and convey the key points of the message to others in an effective way.2.Uses appropriate modes of communication for information sharing 3.Listens well, seek, give and act positively on feedback and take others’ opinions into consideration.4.Keeps own superior and others updated and proactively share with the relevant people on the latest development at the workplace that affect them

name: Energise: Foster Collaboration & Teamwork (ES)
long_description: 1.Participate by working together with line manager, team members and others to achieve team’s objectives and goals2.Address conflicts diplomatically and mediate a workable solution 3.Treats people from diverse background fairly and equally4.Appreciate team members’ contributions.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (ES)
long_description: 1.Aware of business achievements & ongoing issues and implications 2.Recognise own role in the overall function of the department & understands how it relates to the overall Company3.Serves others with conscious appreciation of the monetary implication on the department and company4.Seeks and identifies value adding improvements  in own area of work

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (ES)
long_description: 1.Highlights concerns that prevents efficiency within own area2.Takes responsibility and work towards resolving issues 3.Identifies risks associated with decisions4.Decides where precedence is set

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (ES)
long_description: 1.Define the needs for process improvement within own area based on feedback2.Adjusts individual approach based on the ideas and views or the changing situation3.Spots opportunities to utilize digital tools in getting work done4.Promotes new ideas to improve work

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (ES)
long_description: 1. Willing to be coached for better performance 2. Self motivate to learn new skills, tasks, process/procedures and technology related to the job3. Learn from mistakes as well as through experience and feedback from others4. Share experience & knowledge based on precedence for other to apply

name: Execute: Deliver Performance (ES)
long_description: 1. Able to prioritise tasks according to urgency 2. Displays understanding of noncompliance & its implication3. Perform tasks efficiently, stretching limits to deliver results4. Accepts feedback and recognition to enhance performance

name: Execute: Professionalism & Expertise (ES)
long_description: 1. Conducts self in a professional manner 2. Reaches out to others for guidance to improve professionalism 3. Learning everyday the technical know-how required to carry out work4. Apply technical know-how at work daily

name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (E)
description:
1.Uses appropriate modes of communication for information sharing.
2.Understands & seeks to understand audiences stated requirements and expectations.
3.Shows concern for people and how they feel across levels.
4.Recognizes impact of others’ emotions on self .
long_description:
1.Uses appropriate modes of communication for information sharing.
2.Understands & seeks to understand audiences stated requirements and expectations.
3.Shows concern for people and how they feel across levels.
4.Recognizes impact of others’ emotions on self .

name: Energise: Foster Collaboration & Teamwork (E)
description:
1.Highlights resource constraints proactively .
2.Recognizes sources of conflict and takes early steps to resolve problems.
3.Treats people from diverse background fairly and equally. 
4.Sees challenges from customers’ lens and offers help.
long_description:
1.Highlights resource constraints proactively .
2.Recognizes sources of conflict and takes early steps to resolve problems.
3.Treats people from diverse background fairly and equally. 
4.Sees challenges from customers’ lens and offers help.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (E)
description:
1.Explains PETRONAS purpose to others.
2.Comprehends the impact of business objectives on own department.
3.Proactive in taking actions to meet the team goals.
4.Seeks, identifies & seizes opportunities in own area of work including optimizing cost & resources.
long_description:
1.Explains PETRONAS purpose to others.
2.Comprehends the impact of business objectives on own department.
3.Proactive in taking actions to meet the team goals.
4.Seeks, identifies & seizes opportunities in own area of work including optimizing cost & resources.

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (E)
description:
1.Relies on precedence while establishing cause and effect relationship.
2.Contributes by identifying costs and benefits of options in decision making to improve productivity.
3.Provides bold solutions to problems within own area.
4.Surfaces ambiguity in decision making .
long_description:
1.Relies on precedence while establishing cause and effect relationship.
2.Contributes by identifying costs and benefits of options in decision making to improve productivity.
3.Provides bold solutions to problems within own area.
4.Surfaces ambiguity in decision making .

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (E)
description:
1.Contributes to process improvement keeping in mind customers’ needs.
2.Logically questions existing processes for better/improved customer experience.
3.Adjusts  individual approach based on the ideas and views or the changing situation.
4.Spots opportunities to utilize digital tools in getting work done.
long_description:
1.Contributes to process improvement keeping in mind customers’ needs.
2.Logically questions existing processes for better/improved customer experience.
3.Adjusts  individual approach based on the ideas and views or the changing situation.
4.Spots opportunities to utilize digital tools in getting work done.

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (E)
description:
1.Willing to be coached for better performance.
2.Uses all forms of feedback to improve, develop and learn, aiming at reaching his/her full potential.
3.Practice agile ways of working for effective performance.
4.Leverage others’ strengths & abilities and digital resources to build requisite knowledge at workplace.
long_description:
1.Willing to be coached for better performance.
2.Uses all forms of feedback to improve, develop and learn, aiming at reaching his/her full potential.
3.Practice agile ways of working for effective performance.
4.Leverage others’ strengths & abilities and digital resources to build requisite knowledge at workplace.

name: Execute: Deliver Performance (E)
description:
1.Prepares workplans and monitors progress.
2.Understands preventive measures on non compliance.
3,Identifies root causes of non compliance in own team.
4.Accepts feedback and recognition to enhance performance.
long_description:
1.Prepares workplans and monitors progress.
2.Understands preventive measures on non compliance.
3,Identifies root causes of non compliance in own team.
4.Accepts feedback and recognition to enhance performance.

name: Execute: Professionalism & Expertise (E)
description:
1.Conducts self in a professional manner.
2.Reaches out to others for guidance to improve professionalism .
3.Learning everyday the technical know-how required to carry out work.
4.Apply technical know-how at work daily.
long_description:
1.Conducts self in a professional manner.
2.Reaches out to others for guidance to improve professionalism .
3.Learning everyday the technical know-how required to carry out work.
4.Apply technical know-how at work daily.

name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (M)
description:
1.Presents information persuasively and adjusts communication tactics when needed.
2.Changes communication approach based on the views of the other person.
3.Builds relationships with key contacts in order to benefit the team.
4.Puts self in others’ shoes to understand their drivers of behaviors.
long_description:
1.Presents information persuasively and adjusts communication tactics when needed.
2.Changes communication approach based on the views of the other person.
3.Builds relationships with key contacts in order to benefit the team.
4.Puts self in others’ shoes to understands their drivers of behaviors.

name: Energise: Foster Collaboration & Teamwork (M)
description:
1.Makes complex tasks achievable with clear instructions.
2.Preempts conflicts between stakeholders and takes action to resolve them.
3.Develops rapport with individuals and teams, based on inclusion principles.
4.Actively seeks discussion and views of team members and customers.
long_description:
1.Makes complex tasks achievable with clear instructions.
2.Preempts conflicts between stakeholders and takes action to resolve them.
3.Develops rapport with individuals and teams, based on inclusion principles.
4.Actively seeks discussion and views of team members and customers.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (M)
description:
1.Takes proactive actions to address challenges impacting PETRONAS purpose.
2.Sets team priorities based on the functional objectives.
3.Works out alternatives to overcome challenges.
4.Adds value by applying insights to initiatives of various sizes by including creating ways to optimize cost and resources.
long_description:
1.Takes proactive actions to address challenges impacting PETRONAS purpose.
2.Sets team priorities based on the functional objectives.
3.Works out alternatives to overcome challenges.
4.Adds value by applying insights to initiatives of various sizes by including creating ways to optimize cost and resources.

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (M)
description:
1.Thinks and organizes tasks in sequence.
2.Solutions address immediate and apparent issues.
3.Applies a learned theory, model, concepts to gain an understanding of the situation or a problem.
4.Deals with ambiguity in decision making.
long_description:
1.Thinks and organizes tasks in sequence.
2.Solutions address immediate and apparent issues.
3.Applies a learned theory, model, concepts to gain an understanding of the situation or a problem.
4.Deals with ambiguity in decision making.

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (M)
description:
1.Challenges status quo for benefit of team.
2.Comfortable in making changes for stakeholders’ benefits.
3.Proposes initiatives / actions having innovation potential.
4.Supports implementation of innovative and digital ideas in own team.
long_description:
1.Challenges status quo for benefit of team.
2.Comfortable in making changes for stakeholders’ benefits.
3.Proposes initiatives / actions having innovation potential.
4.Supports implementation of innovative and digital ideas in own team.

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (M)
description:
1.Coaches team to close gaps and to improve performance.
2.Adopt new concepts and techniques to deliver work performance.
3.Empower team to take decisions independently with some check and balance.
4.Adopts digital tools to facilitate change and progress.
long_description:
1.Coaches team to close gaps and to improve performance.
2.Adopt new concepts and techniques to deliver work performance.
3.Empower team to take decisions independently with some check and balance.
4.Adopts digital tools to facilitate change and progress.

name: Execute: Deliver Performance (M)
description:
1.Pre-empts resources constraints and plans accordingly.
2.Anticipates compliance issues while defining processes.
3.Challenges established processes and its suitability to the context.
4.Leads continuous improvement in the team ie. process improvement.
long_description:
1.Pre-empts resources constraints and plans accordingly.
2.Anticipates compliance issues while defining processes.
3.Challenges established processes and its suitability to the context.
4.Leads continuous improvement in the team ie. process improvement.

name: Execute: Professionalism & Expertise (M)
description:
1.Consistently conducts self in a manner aligned with PETRONAS’ ways of working.
2.Applies work related know-how in familiar situations.
3.Skilled and proficient in managing routine problems at work.
4.Reaches out to internal and external experts in solving work problems.
long_description:
1.Consistently conducts self in a manner aligned with PETRONAS’ ways of working.
2.Applies work related know-how in familiar situations.
3.Skilled and proficient in managing routine problems at work.
4.Reaches out to internal and external experts in solving work problems.

name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (SM)
description:
1.Takes cues from non-verbal communication to modify approach.
2.Plans ways to influence relevant stakeholders.
3.Builds networks and partnerships with stakeholders outside own team.
4.Preempts behaviors of people from diverse background.
long_description:
1.Takes cues from non-verbal communication to modify approach.
2.Plans ways to influence relevant stakeholders.
3.Builds networks and partnerships with stakeholders outside own team.
4.Preempts behaviors of people from diverse background.

name: Energise: Foster Collaboration & Teamwork (SM)
description:
1.Creates a safe environment for mistakes to happen.
2.Understands root cause of conflicting agenda of stakeholders.
3.Provides experiences that engage people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives.
4.Builds relationships inside and outside the organization, based on inclusion principles.
long_description:
1.Creates a safe environment for mistakes to happen.
2.Understands root cause of conflicting agenda of stakeholders.
3.Provides experiences that engage people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives.
4.Builds relationships inside and outside the organization, based on inclusion principles.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (SM)
description:
1.Aligns functional initiatives with PETRONAS Purpose.
2.Translates business understanding to specific deliverables for the department.
3.Assesses and minimizes risks in executing team objectives.
4.Adopts intrapreneurial best practices to be leveraged by own team/ function.
long_description:
1.Aligns functional initiatives with PETRONAS Purpose.
2.Translates business understanding to specific deliverables for the department.
3.Assesses and minimizes risks in executing team objectives.
4.Adopts intrapreneurial best practices to be leveraged by own team/ function.

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (SM)
description:
1.Analyses complex issues involving multiple variables.
2.Solutions address systemic issues.
3.Develop scenarios for decision making to create safe risk taking.
4.Comfortable in working with ambiguity and timely decision making.
long_description:
1.Analyses complex issues involving multiple variables.
2.Solutions address systemic issues.
3.Develop scenarios for decision making to create safe risk taking.
4.Comfortable in working with ambiguity and timely decision making.

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (SM)
description:
1.Experiments new ways of working within the team.
2.Preempts opportunities for change in customer experience.
3.Assesses risks associated with change and takes necessary changes.
4.Implements innovative and digital ideas to improve current work practices.
long_description:
1.Experiments new ways of working within the team.
2.Preempts opportunities for change in customer experience.
3.Assesses risks associated with change and takes necessary changes.
4.Implements innovative and digital ideas to improve current work practices.

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (SM)
description:
1.Plays active role in coaching and guiding others to improve performance.
2.Encourages team to build new skills in the industry.
3.Defines the parameters for independent decision making by the team.
4.Encourages adoption of digital tools as a source of self-directed learning.
long_description:
1.Plays active role in coaching and guiding others to improve performance.
2.Encourages team to build new skills in the industry.
3.Defines the parameters for independent decision making by the team.
4.Encourages adoption of digital tools as a source of self-directed learning.

name: Execute: Deliver Performance (SM)
description:
1.Manages inter-dependencies between projects and resources.
2.Develops creative solutions to promote compliance.
3.Identifies overlaps between practices of different teams.
4.Drives synergies and continuous improvement across teams for high performance.
long_description:
1.Manages inter-dependencies between projects and resources.
2.Develops creative solutions to promote compliance.
3.Identifies overlaps between practices of different teams.
4.Drives synergies and continuous improvement across teams for high performance.

name: Execute: Professionalism & Expertise (SM)
description:
1.Role models professionalism within own team.
2.Supports the development of professional standards of team members.
3.Applies the know how at work consistently to solve problems.
4.Expert at managing routine as well as complex problems at work.
long_description:
1.Role models professionalism within own team.
2.Supports the development of professional standards of team members.
3.Applies the know how at work consistently to solve problems.
4.Expert at managing routine as well as complex problems at work.

name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (GM)
description:
1.Provides regular, consistent, and meaningful information to cross functional teams.
2.Builds deep relationships with wide range of people business units and functions. 
3.Looks at trend line in stakeholder behaviors and pre-empts it in interactions.
4.Senses people’s aspirations and underlying needs.
long_description:
1.Provides regular, consistent, and meaningful information to cross functional teams.
2.Builds deep relationships with wide range of people business units and functions. 
3.Looks at trend line in stakeholder behaviors and pre-empts it in interactions.
4.Senses people’s aspirations and underlying needs.

name: Energise: Foster Collaboration & Teamwork (GM)
description:
1.Identifies gaps in team and identifies methods to derive synergies for performance improvement.
2.Creates a constructive environment, where individuals and teams can leverage diversity to improve business performance & beat hierarchy.
3.Participates in industry forums for expanding network.
4.Promotes team achievement than individualism.
long_description:
1.Identifies gaps in team and identifies methods to derive synergies for performance improvement.
2.Creates a constructive environment, where individuals and teams can leverage diversity to improve business performance & beat hierarchy.
3.Participates in industry forums for expanding network.
4.Promotes team achievement than individualism.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (GM)
description:
1.Creates clarity & align to PETRONAS Purpose.
2.Translates business strategy into priorities for the function to pursue with return on investment.
3.Creates culture of intrapreneurship within the function/unit.
4.Strategically positions business in new spaces with high growth potential .
long_description:
1.Creates clarity & align to PETRONAS Purpose.
2.Translates business strategy into priorities for the function to pursue with return on investment.
3.Creates culture of intrapreneurship within the function/unit.
4.Strategically positions business in new spaces with high growth potential .

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (GM)
description:
1.Identifies broad themes to be addressed when working on complex situations.
2.Provides resources & support for problem solving for the organization.
3.Links decisions with overall strategy and seeks alignment.
4.Guides team when faced with ambiguity.
long_description:
1.Identifies broad themes to be addressed when working on complex situations.
2.Provides resources & support for problem solving for the organization.
3.Links decisions with overall strategy and seeks alignment.
4.Guides team when faced with ambiguity.

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (GM)
description:
1.Identifies proactively stakeholders resisting change and manages it.
2.Adopts speedily new technology / ways of working for the function.
3.Fosters culture of innovation in own function/ business for improved customer experience.
4.Conceptualizes and implements breakthrough initiatives that has potential to substantially benefit PETRONAS.
long_description:
1.Identifies proactively stakeholders resisting change and manages it.
2.Adopts speedily new technology / ways of working for the function.
3.Fosters culture of innovation in own function/ business for improved customer experience.
4.Conceptualizes and implements breakthrough initiatives that has potential to substantially benefit PETRONAS.

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (GM)
description:
1.Inspires the team to work independently.
2.Identifies & build latent and hidden strength of team.
3.Coaches senior team members on empowering the team.
4.Fosters culture of self directed digital learning in own function/ business.
long_description:
1.Inspires the team to work independently.
2.Identifies & build latent and hidden strength of team.
3.Coaches senior team members on empowering the team.
4.Fosters culture of self directed digital learning in own function/ business.

name: Execute: Deliver Performance (GM)
description:
1.Takes a holistic perspective of the project and its anticipated benefits
2.Creates systematic methods of educating team on compliance
3.Identifies overlaps between practices of different functions
4.Initiates strategic initiatives to drive Operational Excellence and Continuous Improvements.
long_description:
1.Takes a holistic perspective of the project and its anticipated benefits
2.Creates systematic methods of educating team on compliance
3.Identifies overlaps between practices of different functions
4.Initiates strategic initiatives to drive Operational Excellence and Continuous Improvements.

name: Execute: Professionalism & Expertise (GM)
description:
1. Role models professionalism while interacting with internal and external stakeholders
2. Leverages professional network to establish a community of practice
3. Coach others to apply the work-related know-how
4. Guides the development of internal standards of work
long_description:
1. Role models professionalism while interacting with internal and external stakeholders
2. Leverages professional network to establish a community of practice
3. Coach others to apply the work-related know-how
4. Guides the development of internal standards of work

name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (SGM)
description:
1.Role models open exchange of information with clarity.
2.Uses complex, multi-layered influencing strategies to bring about sustainable changes.
3.Exemplifies being engaged and constantly creates the same in teams.
4.Coaches team in treating others with empathy in delivering results.
long_description:
1.Role models open exchange of information with clarity.
2.Uses complex, multi-layered influencing strategies to bring about sustainable changes.
3.Exemplifies being engaged and constantly creates the same in teams.
4.Coaches team in treating others with empathy in delivering results.

name: Energise: Foster Collaboration & Teamwork (SGM)
description:
1.Allows calculated risks in delivering results in the spirit of learning.
2.Uses a combination of approaches  to orchestrate the desired effects.
3.Surfaces possible impediments to team working and uses a wide range of approaches to overcome them.
4.Creates sense of team achievement rather than celebrating individualism & beating hierarchy.
long_description:
1.Allows calculated risks in delivering results in the spirit of learning.
2.Uses a combination of approaches  to orchestrate the desired effects.
3.Surfaces possible impediments to team working and uses a wide range of approaches to overcome them.
4.Creates sense of team achievement rather than celebrating individualism & beating hierarchy.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (SGM)
description:
1.Rallies towards PETRONAS Purpose & Enterprise strategy in actions taken.
2.Translates enterprise strategy into specific business priorities.
3.Shapes business levers to align with Enterprise strategy.
4.Integrates new opportunities/initiatives/businesses within the PETRONAS enterprise strategy.
long_description:
1.Rallies towards PETRONAS Purpose & Enterprise strategy in actions taken.
2.Translates enterprise strategy into specific business priorities.
3.Shapes business levers to align with Enterprise strategy.
4.Integrates new opportunities/initiatives/businesses within the PETRONAS enterprise strategy.

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (SGM)
description:
1.Identifies interlinkages between multiple organizational problems.
2.Establishes new linkages between previously unrelated dimensions and creates new meaning. 
3.Champions “Out of box” solutions to seek lasting improvements.
4.Nurture team’s capability on problem solving & decision making.
long_description:
1.Identifies interlinkages between multiple organizational problems.
2.Establishes new linkages between previously unrelated dimensions and creates new meaning. 
3.Champions “Out of box” solutions to seek lasting improvements.
4.Nurture team’s capability on problem solving & decision making.

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (SGM)
description:
1.Visualizes/ideates future needs of organization change from customer lens.
2.Quick to sense opportunity or change and its impact on strategy.
3.Creates an enabling environment leveraging on technology to drive innovation.
4.Brings new resources and capabilities in the teams to augment abilities in innovating faster.
long_description:
1.Visualizes/ideates future needs of organization change from customer lens.
2.Quick to sense opportunity or change and its impact on strategy.
3.Creates an enabling environment leveraging on technology to drive innovation.
4.Brings new resources and capabilities in the teams to augment abilities in innovating faster.

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (SGM)
description:
1.Coaches senior team members to become coaches.
2.Develops a proactive learning mindset in senior team members.
3.Role models an empowered self-directed learning.
4.Nurtures the culture of digital & self-directed learning at Enterprise level.
long_description:
1.Coaches senior team members to become coaches.
2.Develops a proactive learning mindset in senior team members.
3.Role models an empowered self-directed learning.
4.Nurtures the culture of digital & self-directed learning at Enterprise level.

name: Execute: Deliver Performance (SGM)
description:
1.Conceptualises different projects or initiatives of various magnitude across the businesses.
2.Aligns organizational resources in delivering different projects or initiatives of various magnitude.
3.Champions compliance culture in the organization.
4.Drives the culture of continuous improvement to boost productivity and quality.
long_description:
1.Conceptualises different projects or initiatives of various magnitude across the businesses.
2.Aligns organizational resources in delivering different projects or initiatives of various magnitude.
3.Champions compliance culture in the organization.
4.Drives the culture of continuous improvement to boost productivity and quality.

name: Execute: Professionalism & Expertise (SGM)
description:
1.Elevates the standards of work in PETRONAS.
2.Elevates professional standards of employees in PETRONAS.
3.Role models the know how at work.
4.Coaches senior team members on work-related matters.

1.Creates a safe environment for mistakes to happen .
2.Understands root cause of conflicting agenda of stakeholders.
3.Provides experiences that engage people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives.
4.Builds relationships inside and outside the organization, based on inclusion principles.

name: Decide: Set Goals & Drive Directions (P)
description:
1.Aligns functional initiatives with PETRONAS Purpose.
2.Translates business understanding to specific deliverables for the department.
3.Assesses and minimizes risks in executing team objectives.
4.Adopts intrapreneurial best practices to be leveraged by own team/ function .
long_description:
1.Aligns functional initiatives with PETRONAS Purpose.
2.Translates business understanding to specific deliverables for the department.
3.Assesses and minimizes risks in executing team objectives.
4.Adopts intrapreneurial best practices to be leveraged by own team/ function .

name: Decide: Analysis & Problem Solving (P)
description:
1.Analyses complex issues involving multiple variables.
2.Solutions address systemic issues.
3.Develop scenarios for decision making to create safe risk taking.
4.Comfortable in working with ambiguity and timely decision making.
long_description:
1.Analyses complex issues involving multiple variables.
2.Solutions address systemic issues.
3.Develop scenarios for decision making to create safe risk taking.
4.Comfortable in working with ambiguity and timely decision making.

name: Grow: Lead Change & Innovation (P)
description:

2.Preempts opportunities for change in customer experience.
3.Assesses risks associated with change and takes necessary changes.
4.Implements innovative and digital ideas to improve current work practices.

name: Grow: Commitment to Learning & Development (P)
description:

2.Encourages team to build new skills in the industry.
3.Defines the parameters for independent decision making by the team.
4.Encourages adoption of digital tools as a source of self-directed learning.

description:

name: Energise: Interpersonal Effectiveness (C)
description:
1.Provides regular, consistent, and meaningful information to cross functional teams.
2.Builds deep relationships with wide range of people business units and functions. 
3.Looks at trend line in stakeholder behaviors and pre-empts it in interactions.
4.Senses people’s aspirations and underlying needs.

description:

3.Participates in industry forums for expanding network.
4.Promotes team achievement than individualism.
